text: Artificial intelligence is becoming a bigger part of our daily lives, but it also raises important ethical questions. One major issue is bias: if AI systems learn from data that contains unfair patterns, they can make biased decisions, for example in hiring or lending. This threatens fairness, as certain groups may be unfairly treated. Privacy is another concern, since AI often collects large amounts of personal data without clear consent. To address these problems, transparency is needed—people should understand how AI makes decisions. Ultimately, responsible AI development means building systems that prioritize ethical values, protect rights, and benefit everyone equally.
